name: open-presentation
description: Skill-first plugin for cinematic HTML presentations and video ads, packaged for public install in Codex and Claude-style marketplaces.

interface.shortDescription: Install a skill-first HTML presentation system as a plugin.
interface.longDescription: Install from GitHub and get a skill-first presentation workflow for cinematic, text-light, motion-heavy, zero-dependency HTML presentations with optional deterministic 4K WebM export. The plugin is the install surface; the bundled skill writes real workspace artifacts such as presentation.html and design.md.
defaultPrompt: Use open-presentation to build a launch video ad and write presentation.html, presentation.json, and design.md in this workspace.
Use open-presentation to turn our pricing page into a cinematic HTML presentation in workspace files.
Use open-presentation to create a 9:16 product demo reel as zero-dependency HTML in this workspace.
